title: atriplex gardneri var. robusta
intro: Atriplex gardneri var. robusta, also known as robust saltbush or robust orach, is a shrubby plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is a member of the amaranth family, Amaranthaceae, and is valued for its medicinal and nutritional properties. The leaves of the robust saltbush plant contain antioxidants and other compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for digestive health and wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, fever, and respiratory problems.
